docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, RAYMOND JOHN  R/O $696.13 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $753.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
